channel.title: Set up Frontity to connect to local wordpress, "request to xxx failed, reason: connect ECONNREFUSED xxx"
channel.description:
Hi, I tried to setup Frontity on my Windows 10 using the Quick Start Guide, but could not get it to run. @Johan suggested running it in Docker as Windows and Node can have issues...
I found this tutorial: [https://github.com/trustos/frontity-wp-template](https://github.com/trustos/frontity-wp-template) Following it I was able to get Docker set-up, and Frontity working... However, it only works if I point the **state.source.url** to a live wordpress website.
If I point it to **http://localhost:8080/** the frontity site displays this message:
> request to http://localhost:8080/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?_embed=true&page=1 failed, reason: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:8080
I'm happy to get something with a live site, but would love to be able to use a local site to develop from...
I followed the above mentioned guide, the only file values I changed were:
* .env -> DB_ROOT_PASSWORD -> changed to personal pw * frontity.settings.js -> state.source.url -> changed to "http://localhost:8080/" * frontity.settings.js -> state.frontity.url -> changed to "http://localhost:8080/"
Are there any thoughts on this? Much appreciated in advance!

item.title: Set up Frontity to connect to local wordpress, "request to xxx failed, reason: connect ECONNREFUSED xxx"
item.dc:creator: Faraz_ahmed
item.source: Set up Frontity to connect to local wordpress, "request to xxx failed, reason: connect ECONNREFUSED xxx"

item.title: Set up Frontity to connect to local wordpress, "request to xxx failed, reason: connect ECONNREFUSED xxx"
item.dc:creator: Gwynbleidd
item.description:
Hi Faraz_ahmed, sorry to say but no I could not get his resolved. If anyone has an idea, or if you manage to figure it out, I’d greatly appreciate to know how!

Read full topic
item.source: Set up Frontity to connect to local wordpress, "request to xxx failed, reason: connect ECONNREFUSED xxx"

item.title: Set up Frontity to connect to local wordpress, "request to xxx failed, reason: connect ECONNREFUSED xxx"
item.dc:creator: Faraz_ahmed
item.description:
Hello!
I’m facing the same issue, please let me know if you managed to get it fixed.
Thanks in advance

Read full topic
item.source: Set up Frontity to connect to local wordpress, "request to xxx failed, reason: connect ECONNREFUSED xxx"

item.title: Set up Frontity to connect to local wordpress, "request to xxx failed, reason: connect ECONNREFUSED xxx"
item.dc:creator: Gwynbleidd
item.description:
Hi, I tried to setup Frontity on my Windows 10 using the Quick Start Guide, but could not get it to run. @Johan suggested running it in Docker as Windows and Node can have issues…

I found this tutorial: https://github.com/trustos/frontity-wp-template
Following it I was able to get Docker set-up, and Frontity working… However, it only works if I point the state.source.url to a live wordpress website.

If I point it to http://localhost:8080/ the frontity site displays this message:

request to http://localhost:8080/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?_embed=true&page=1 failed, reason: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:8080

I’m happy to get something with a live site, but would love to be able to use a local site to develop from…

I followed the above mentioned guide, the only file values I changed were:

  • .env → DB_ROOT_PASSWORD → changed to personal pw
  • frontity.settings.js → state.source.url → changed to “http://localhost:8080/”
  • frontity.settings.js → state.frontity.url → changed to “http://localhost:8080/”

Are there any thoughts on this? Much appreciated in advance!

Read full topic
item.source: Set up Frontity to connect to local wordpress, "request to xxx failed, reason: connect ECONNREFUSED xxx"
